name: kraken-cli
description: Agent-first CLI for trading crypto, stocks, forex, and derivatives on Kraken.

interface.shortDescription: Trade crypto, stocks, forex, and derivatives from your AI agent.
interface.longDescription: Agent-first CLI with a built-in MCP server. 151 commands covering spot, futures, xStocks, forex, staking, and paper trading. Ships with 50 goal-oriented skills for strategies like DCA, grid trading, basis trades, and portfolio rebalancing. Paper trading works out of the box with no API keys; live trading is an explicit opt-in via expanded MCP service flags.
defaultPrompt: Give me a morning market brief for BTC, ETH, and SOL.
Paper trade a DCA strategy on BTCUSD for 5 minutes and show the result.
Scan perpetual futures funding rates for attractive carry opportunities.
